name: Python 3
updateContentCommand: [ -f packages.txt ] && sudo apt update && sudo xargs -r apt install -y < packages.txt; python3 -m pip install --upgrade pip; python3 -m pip install -e '.[dev]'; echo 'Environment ready'

postAttachCommand.server: python3 -m streamlit run kllama.py --server.enableCORS false --server.enableXsrfProtection false
